stories.text: As a manager, I want to have an overview and modification functionality of all ongoing and upcoming sessions, tutor and student statuses, and matching details, so that I can address issues in real time.

json.text: As a manager, I want to have an overview and modification functionality of all ongoing and upcoming sessions, tutor and student statuses, and matching details, so that I can address issues in real time.

means.text: have an overview and modification functionality of all ongoing and upcoming sessions tutor and student statuses and matching details

ends.text: I can address issues in real time

stories.text: As a manager, I want to be able to verify accounts of students and tutors.

json.text: As a manager, I want to be able to verify accounts of students and tutors.

means.text: verify accounts of students and tutors
means.indicator: I want to be able to

stories.text: As a student, I want to be able to make my account, so that I can access the platform where I can manage my matches, sessions, and pay securely.

json.text: As a student, I want to be able to make my account, so that I can access the platform where I can manage my matches, sessions, and pay securely.

means.text: make my account
means.indicator: I want to be able to

ends.text: I can access the platform where I can manage my matches sessions and pay securely

stories.text: As a tutor, I want to be able to make an account with my personal information, so that I can access the platform where I can find clients for my services.
